(function(){ var cv=document.getElementById('sc'),ctx=cv.getContext('2d'); function rs(){cv.width=window.innerWidth;cv.height=window.innerHeight}rs(); window.addEventListener('resize',rs); var st=Array.from({length:100},function(){return{x:Math.random()*cv.width,y:Math.random()*cv.height,sz:Math.random()*2+.5,sp:Math.random()*3+.5}}); (function a(){ctx.clearRect(0,0,cv.width,cv.height);ctx.fillStyle='white';st.forEach(function(s){s.y+=s.sp;if(s.y>cv.height){s.y=0;s.x=Math.random()*cv.width}ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(s.x,s.y,s.sz,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill()});requestAnimationFrame(a)})(); var DB='GCD',ST='GF',DUR=7776e6,BASE='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/ToxicBurstXZ/'; function odb(){return new Promise(function(r,j){var q=indexedDB.open(DB,1);q.onupgradeneeded=function(e){var d=e.target.result;if(!d.objectStoreNames.contains(ST))d.createObjectStore(ST,{keyPath:'url'})};q.onsuccess=function(e){r(e.target.result)};q.onerror=function(e){j(e.target.error)}})} function sv(url,c){return odb().then(function(d){return new Promise(function(r,j){var s=d.transaction(ST,'readwrite').objectStore(ST);s.put({url:url,content:c,timestamp:Date.now()}).onsuccess=r;s.put({url:url,content:c,timestamp:Date.now()}).onerror=j})})} function gf(url){return odb().then(function(d){return new Promise(function(r,j){var s=d.transaction(ST,'readonly').objectStore(ST);s.get(url).onsuccess=function(e){var x=e.target.result;if(x&&(Date.now()-x.timestamp)<DUR){r(x.content)}else{fetch(url).then(function(q){return q.text()}).then(function(t){sv(url,t);r(t)}).catch(j)}};s.get(url).onerror=j})})} function og(file,name){gf(BASE+file).then(function(t){var w=window.open('','_blank');if(w){w.document.open();w.document.write(t);w.document.close()}else alert('Allow popups to open IntersectionObserver(function(e){e.forEach(function(x){if(x.isIntersecting){var i=x.target;i.src=i.dataset.src;ob.unobserve(i)}})},{rootMargin:'200px'}); function show(list){ var No Games Found';return} var fr=document.createDocumentFragment(); list.forEach(function(g){ var d=document.createElement('div');d.className='gc';d.onclick=function(){og(g.f,g.n)}; var im=document.createElement('img');im.dataset.src=BASE+g.i;im.src='';im.alt=g.n;im.className='gi';im.loading='lazy';ob.observe(im); var t=document.createElement('div');t.textContent=g.n;t.className='gt'; d.appendChild(im);d.appendChild(t);fr.appendChild(d); }); gc.appendChild(fr); } show(gd); var tm; document.getElementById('si').addEventListener('input',function(e){ clearTimeout(tm);tm=setTimeout(function(){var q=e.target.value.toLowerCase().trim();show(q?gd.filter(function(g){return g.n.toLowerCase().includes(q)}):gd)},150); }); })();
